scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/product-analysis build && pnpm --filter @tinker/demo-assembly build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/product-analysis build && pnpm --filter @tinker/demo-assembly build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
